metadata.name: Add an Authorized User to Account

description: A customer wants to add their spouse as an authorized user who can make changes to the account.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the primary account holder's identity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully verifies the identity of the person making the request.

nodes.task_description: Explain the permissions an authorized user will have.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates what an authorized user can and cannot do.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new user's information and add them to the account with the 'authorized user' role.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the new user to the account.
